---
name: New pattern
about: Propose a new step or functional pattern
title: "[PATTERN] <pattern-id>"
labels: pattern, enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Pattern ID
`step.<slug>` or `pattern.<slug>`

## Pattern type
- [ ] StepPattern
- [ ] FunctionalPattern

## Source
Link to the canonical GovStack spec page this pattern is based on:

## Rationale
Why does this pattern need to be added? What gap does it fill?

## Draft
If you have a draft JSON, paste it here or link to a branch:

## Checklist
- [ ] Pattern not already in the catalogue
- [ ] Source URL confirmed
- [ ] Conforms to schema (or schema change needed)
